channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: BRICS meeting in Delhi ends with no joint statement amid Iran-UAE tensions
item.description: Top diplomats from BRICS nations, including Iran and the UAE, wrapped up a two-day meeting in Delhi on Friday without issuing a joint statement, highlighting significant divisions within the bloc. Ira...

item.title: Prominent Mpumalanga Rhino Poaching Suspect Killed in Shooting
item.description: Joseph “Big Joe” Nyalungu, a well-known businessman and suspected rhino poaching kingpin, was fatally shot at a crossroad near his business premises in Mkhuhlu, Mpumalanga, on Saturday. The attack fol...

item.title: Analyst Calls for Independent Probe into Recent Senate Shooting Incident
item.description: An analyst has recommended the creation of an independent body to thoroughly investigate the shooting incident that occurred inside the Philippine Senate. The event took place on May 13, 2026, when gu...

item.title: The Life and Tragic Death of Ndugu M’Hali, Companion of Explorer Henry Morton Stanley
item.description: Ndugu M’Hali, also known as Kalulu, was an African boy born around 1865 in what is now Tanzania. Captured as a child during a slave raid, he was sold in Tabora and later acquired by the Victorian expl...

item.title: Barcelona Women Complete Domestic Treble Ahead of Champions League Final
item.description: Barcelona women's football team don show say dem dey unstoppable for Spain as dem clinch the domestic treble on Saturday by beating Atletico Madrid 3-1 for Copa de la Reina final. Players wey score be...

item.title: House Democrats Reveal DOJ Redacted Document Potentially Identifying Epstein Co-Conspirators
item.description: During a shadow hearing in Palm Beach, Florida, House Oversight Committee Democrats highlighted a key document that could reveal the identities of Jeffrey Epstein's co-conspirators. Representative Raj...

item.title: BARMM Political Parties to Conduct Voter Education for First Parliamentary Elections
item.description: COTABATO CITY, Philippines — Officials from four major political parties in the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) have pledged to help educate voters ahead of the region's first-...

item.title: Hearts condemn pitch invasion and threatening behaviour at Celtic Park
item.description: Heart of Midlothian (Hearts) has condemned the behaviour of some Celtic fans following Saturday's Scottish Premiership title decider, describing it as an 'embarrassment to Scottish football'. The inci...

item.title: PBA: Jerom Lastimosa Focuses on Moving Forward After Late Mistakes in Loss to Meralco Bolts
item.description: In the ongoing PBA Season 50 Commissioner's Cup, Magnolia Hotshots guard Jerom Lastimosa is choosing to move forward after committing costly errors in the closing moments of their game against the Mer...

item.title: Tommy Robinson calls for political mobilisation at London rally amid far-right demonstrations
item.description: Far-right activist Tommy Robinson, born Stephen Yaxley-Lennon, addressed tens of thousands of supporters in central London during his second 'Unite the Kingdom' rally. While organisers claimed million...

item.title: Delta Flight Returns to Atlanta Due to Operational Issues, Lagos Passengers Stranded
item.description: Delta Air Lines flight DL54 wey suppose fly from Atlanta go Lagos made return after eight hours for sky due to operational wahala, the airline talk. Di Airbus A330-200 wey dey involved left Atlanta fo...

item.title: DA Urged to Extend Financial Aid to Vegetable Farmers in Nueva Vizcaya Due to Rising Fuel and Input Costs
item.description: In a recent meeting of the North Luzon Growth Quadrangle in Congress, Nueva Vizcaya Representative Tim Cayton called on the Department of Agriculture (DA) to include vegetable farmers in the financial...

item.title: Jammu and Kashmir NC government agrees to liquor prohibition following BJP protest
item.description: In a significant policy reversal, the National Conference (NC) government in Jammu and Kashmir has announced plans to ban the sale and consumption of alcohol in the Union Territory, following protests...

item.title: Ramaphosa Maintains Position Amid Court Ruling on Phala Phala Case
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa of South Africa has stated clearly that he will not resign despite the Constitutional Court ordering Parliament to reconsider a report that could lead to his impeachment. The...

item.title: Amnesty International urges Nigerian government to act on recent school kidnappings in Oyo and Borno
item.description: Amnesty International don dey raise alarm as plenty school pikin dem dey get abducted for Nigeria, wey dey make insecurity worse and dey affect children education. For just few days, armed people don ...

item.title: Andhra Pradesh Introduces Financial Incentives for Families with Third and Fourth Child
item.description: Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister N Chandrababu Naidu has announced a new incentive scheme for families having more than two children, as part of the state government's population management policy. Speak...

item.title: San Francisco Tech Workers Face Unequal Opportunities Amid AI Boom
item.description: The AI boom is creating an unprecedented wealth divide in the tech industry, especially in San Francisco. Menlo Ventures partner Deedy Das highlighted the growing gap in outcomes, noting that approxim...

item.title: Harry Kane Tops Scoring Charts Ahead of 2026 World Cup
item.description: Harry Kane, at 32, continues to establish himself as one of the deadliest centre-forwards in world football. Now playing for Bayern Munich, Kane has maintained an exceptional scoring record, netting 1...

item.title: House of Reps aspirant Mahmud Sadis Buba withdraws amid controversy over true age
item.description: Honourable Mahmud Sadis Buba, wey dey claim say him be 30-year-old, don withdraw him ambition to represent Sabon Gari Federal Constituency for Kaduna State under APC. Di party leadership apparently re...

item.title: Venezuela Fury, 16, Marries Noah Price, 19, on the Isle of Man
item.description: Venezuela Fury, aged 16, and boxer Noah Price, 19, were married at the Victorian Royal Chapel of St John's on the Isle of Man on Saturday. The bride wore a lace gown with an impressive 50-foot train a...
